channel.title: GitHub Rich Text Format Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Rich Text Format in GitHub

item.title: ckeditor/ckeditor5
item.description: Powerful rich text editor framework with a modular architecture, modern integrations, and features like collaborative editing.

item.title: songhuiqing/book
item.description: 个人认为对技术提升很不错的书

item.title: github/dmca
item.description: Repository with text of DMCA takedown notices as received. GitHub does not endorse or adopt any assertion contained in the following notices. Users identified in the notices are presumed innocent until proven guilty. Additional information about our DMCA policy can be found at

item.title: sqlsec/clover
item.description: Share some hackintosh Clover files 分享一些黑苹果clover配置文件

item.title: phodal/github
item.description: GitHub 漫游指南- a Chinese ebook on how to build a good project on Github. Explore the users' behavior. Find some thing interest.

item.title: ckeditor/ckeditor4
item.description: The best enterprise-grade WYSIWYG editor. Fully customizable with countless features and plugins.

item.title: dotnet/docs-desktop
item.description: This repository contains .NET documentation related to Windows Forms (winforms) and Windows Presentation Foundation (WPF).
